ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insider_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was filed with regulators */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the traded company */,
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insider involved in the trade */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the insider */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., Sale, Purchase) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "owned" REAL /* Total number of shares owned after the trade */,
  "delta_own" TEXT /* Change in ownership percentage */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "filing_link" TEXT /* Link to the SEC filing documenting the trade */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company involved in the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., Completed, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Log of any changes made to the trade record */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of regulatory approval (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_trades_insider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insider_id") REFERENCES insiders ("insider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_trades_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_trades_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_trades_trade_type FOREIGN KEY ("trade_type") REFERENCES trade_types ("type_description")
)

CREATE TABLE "insiders" (
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the insider */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the insider's profile for more details */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the insider is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the company the insider works in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the insider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the insider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insider */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the insider */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the insider (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insiders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the ticker */,
  "ticker_link" TEXT /* Link to an external resource for the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_types" (
  "trade_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the trade type (e.g., Sale, Purchase) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trade type */,
  "regulatory_requirements" TEXT /* Regulatory requirements associated with the trade type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_type_id")
)
